tools.name: execute-task
tools.title: Execute OpenCode Task
tools.description: Execute a one-shot opencode build task from a caller-supplied prompt and model. Sets up the skills symlink and runs opencode in the supplied project directory. Returns success or failure only; artifacts are written to disk by opencode.

prompt.description: Prompt to execute with opencode. The caller owns prompt construction and inclusion of any task data.

projectDir.description: Directory where opencode will run. A .opencode/skills symlink is created here pointing to /code/skills. Task-specific skills may create subdirectories as needed inside this directory.

model.description: OpenCode model identifier selected by the caller.
